[[Private/Legends|Private]] '''Joaa'n''' was a muscular, stocky, [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] explosives expert who played a key role in the [[Capture of the Helot's Shackle|raiding]] of the [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] ship [[Emancipator (CR90 corvette)|''Helot's Shackle'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was one of the few members of [[Red Hand Squadron]] to live long enough to fight in their [[Battle of Toprawa|last stand]] at [[Toprawa/Legends|Toprawa]]—giving [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] enough time to receive the [[Death Star plans/Legends|Death Star plans]]—where she was killed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
